backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing four implemented features: hero background image at 45% opacity, enlarged logo, removal of decorative circle in HeroSection, and corrected WhatsApp number in ContactSection.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one- to two-sentence summaries of each frontend source file for the Growth Byte Digital landing page project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file that defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Growth Byte Digital React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that tracks scroll state and composes all landing page sections (Navbar, Hero, Services, About, WhyChooseUs, Contact, Footer) into a single page layout.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Two-column about section featuring the transparent logo with floating stat cards (5x ROI, 200+ clients) and descriptive copy on a dark navy background.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact section with a WhatsApp CTA linking to wa.me/916265381119, phone/email/location info, and a contact form with simulated submission handling.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying the transparent logo at 60px height, social media icon links, quick navigation links, and contact details on a dark navy background.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section for Growth Byte Digital with a background image, logo, headline, tagline, CTA buttons (scroll to contact/services), and a stats row showing clients, ROI, and satisfaction metrics.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with logo, smooth-scroll nav links, a 'Get Free Audit' CTA, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu.
Displays a grid of five color-coded service cards (Social Media, Meta Ads, Google Ads, Lead Generation, Local Marketing) plus a CTA card, each with an icon and description.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUsSecti: Renders a 2×2 grid of numbered reason cards explaining the agency's advantages: result-driven strategy, affordability, data optimization, and local expertise.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, identity persistence, and delegation validity checks.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Inter and Poppins fonts, defining Tailwind base/component/utility layers, and declaring CSS custom properties for the navy-blue/yellow brand theme in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color tokens (using oklch), fonts, border radius, box shadows, and keyframe animations for the frontend, with plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking the current version, summary, architectural notes, known issues, and existing implemented features for the Growth Byte Digital agency landing page project.
